# Phil G.

> UX/Product Design Leader, Prague (Czechia). 17+ years
> building products for Walmart, VMware, Pivotal Labs, Microsoft, SAP,
> WWF, Cemex, Vodafone, Kuoni Tumlare, and the Royal Air Force. Working English
> (Fluent), Portuguese (Native), Spanish (Professional). AI-native
> prototyping, design leadership, product discovery, and
> production-ready code. Accepting 2026 enterprise engagements.

Phil designs AND builds the product. NN/g Certified UX Master, IDEO
Creative Leadership graduate, and IBM Enterprise Design Thinking
practitioner. Embedded with engineering squads, not parked next to
them. Ships in days, not quarters. Mentored 1,050+ designers
who've led at hundreds of firms, including Meta, Booking.com,
Uber, IBM, Accenture, SAP, Thoughtworks, Zalando, and Kuoni
Tumlare across 11 countries.

Contact: hello@philg.cz · https://www.linkedin.com/in/felipeaela/

## Selected Work

- [Kuoni Tumlare](https://philg.cz/work/kuoni-tumlare): Built a
  twelve-person design org behind a single AI-ready design system
  shipping against a 100+ engineer organisation.
- [VMware / Pivotal](https://philg.cz/work/pivotal-vmware): Hands-on
  enterprise UX leadership inside the Pivotal Labs model.
- [SAP](https://philg.cz/work/sap): Enterprise-scale design system
  and product discovery work for SAP.
- [Cemex](https://philg.cz/work/cemex): Design for a 50+ country
  industrial operations platform, spanning Mexico, Egypt, the
  Philippines, and Texas under one design organisation.
- [Walmart](https://philg.cz/work/walmart): Retail-tech product
  design at enterprise scale.
- [Royal Air Force](https://philg.cz/work/royal-air-force): UX work
  for defence-grade tooling.
- [OpenSC / WWF](https://philg.cz/work/wwf-opensc): Supply-chain
  traceability design for WWF's sustainability platform.
- [Wasps / Vodafone](https://philg.cz/work/wasps-vodafone): Telco
  product design for Vodafone.
- [Aela](https://philg.cz/work/aela): Phil's own venture / studio.

## Insights

- [Design is a leadership problem.](https://philg.cz/insights/design-is-a-leadership-problem):
  Essay on why design fails when treated as a deliverables function.
- [The AI prototyping stack I actually use.](https://philg.cz/insights/ai-prototyping-stack):
  Phil's day-to-day AI-native toolchain (Claude Code, Codex,
  Gemini, Figma, Miro, pen & paper, whiteboard, Jira) and the
  prompting + design-system patterns that make it ship.
- [From insight to shipped product, in days.](https://philg.cz/insights/kuoni-design-system):
  How a single AI-ready design system at Kuoni Tumlare let twelve
  designers in Prague ship in parallel across a 100-engineer org.
- [17 years, 11 countries, 1,000 mentees.](https://philg.cz/insights/seventeen-years-mentees):
  Mentorship retrospective spanning Meta, Booking.com, Uber, IBM,
  Accenture, and beyond.
- [Designing for 50+ countries at Cemex.](https://philg.cz/insights/cemex-50-countries-talk):
  Talk on operating a single design system across 50+ country
  contexts.

## Topical Areas

- **Product discovery** that turns user research into board-room
  business outcomes.
- **AI-native prototyping** that compresses ideation-to-shipped-code
  from quarters to days.
- **Design leadership** that builds high-performing teams (hiring,
  coaching, scaling design orgs).
- **Design systems** that are tokenised, AI-ready, and survive
  hand-off to engineering platform teams.
- **UX research**, **systems thinking**, and **Agile** delivery.
